message:
🐛 Add concurrency group to hourly coverage to prevent queue pileup (#4176)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,6 +8,10 @@ on:
     - cron: '15 * * * *'  # Every hour at :15
   workflow_dispatch:
 
+concurrency:
+  group: coverage-hourly
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
 permissions:
   contents: read
